title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star
lyrics:

title: Mary Had a Little Lamb
lyrics:

lyrics:

lyrics:

title: This Little Piggy

title: For Want of a Nail

title: Jerry Hall
lyrics:

A rat could eat him, hat and all.
He went to town, and bought a horn,
And blew it loud, both night and morn.
image_prompt: cartoon small cheerful boy blowing a toy horn in a village, storybook style

title: Little Tommy Tucker
lyrics:
Little Tommy Tucker sings for his supper,
What shall he eat? White bread and butter.
How will he cut it without a knife?
How will he marry without a wife?
image_prompt: cartoon boy singing happily at a dinner table, cozy home storybook style

title: Monday's Child
lyrics:
Monday's child is fair of face,
Tuesday's child is full of grace.
Wednesday's child is full of woe,
Thursday's child has far to go.
Friday's child is loving and giving,
Saturday's child works hard for a living.
image_prompt: cartoon calendar week with cheerful children illustrations, colorful storybook style

title: Oranges and Lemons
lyrics:
Oranges and lemons, say the bells of St. Clement's.
You owe me five farthings, say the bells of St. Martin's.
When will you pay me? Say the bells of Old Bailey.
image_prompt: cartoon church bell towers over a cheerful town, colorful storybook style

title: Pussycat Pussycat Where Have You Been
lyrics:
Pussycat, pussycat, where have you been?
I've been to London to look at the queen.
Pussycat, pussycat, what did you there?
I frightened a little mouse under her chair.
image_prompt: cartoon curious cat exploring a royal palace, playful storybook style

title: Sleep Baby Sleep
lyrics:
Sleep, baby, sleep,
Thy father guards the sheep.
Thy mother shakes the dreamland tree,
And from it fall sweet dreams for thee.
Sleep, baby, sleep.
image_prompt: cartoon peaceful nursery with a sleeping baby under a starry window, gentle storybook style

title: Taffy Was a Welshman
lyrics:
Taffy was a Welshman, Taffy was a thief,
Taffy came to my house and stole a leg of beef.
I went to Taffy's house, Taffy was not home,
Taffy came to my house and stole a marrow bone.
image_prompt: cartoon cozy countryside cottage with a mischievous character, storybook style

title: The Queen of Hearts
lyrics:
The Queen of Hearts, she made some tarts,
All on a summer's day.
The Knave of Hearts, he stole those tarts,
And took them clean away.
image_prompt: cartoon playful queen baking tarts in a castle kitchen, whimsical storybook style

title: Three Little Kittens
lyrics:
Three little kittens, they lost their mittens,
And they began to cry.
Oh mother dear, we sadly fear,
Our mittens we have lost.
image_prompt: cartoon three fluffy kittens looking for mittens in the snow, cozy storybook style

title: What Are Little Boys Made Of
lyrics:
What are little boys made of?
Snips and snails, and puppy dog tails.
What are little girls made of?
Sugar and spice, and everything nice.
image_prompt: cartoon playful children in a colorful garden, cheerful storybook style

title: Where Are You Going My Pretty Maid
lyrics:
Where are you going, my pretty maid?
I'm going a-milking, sir, she said.
May I go with you, my pretty maid?
You're kindly welcome, sir, she said.
image_prompt: cartoon girl carrying a milk pail through a green countryside, storybook style

title: Wind the Bobbin Up
lyrics:
Wind the bobbin up, wind the bobbin up,
Pull, pull, clap, clap, clap.
Point to the ceiling, point to the floor,
Point to the window, point to the door.
image_prompt: cartoon child doing playful hand motions in a bright playroom, cheerful storybook style

title: The Fox and the Grapes Rhyme
lyrics:
A fox once saw some grapes so high,
He jumped and jumped but could not fly.
Too green, he said, and walked away,
And never tried another day.
image_prompt: cartoon fox looking up at a grapevine on a trellis, storybook fable style

title: Cat and Fiddle
lyrics:
The cat and the fiddle,
Played a merry tune.
The cow jumped over,
A great big silver moon.
image_prompt: cartoon cat playing a fiddle under a big silver moon, whimsical storybook style

title: Little Drops of Water
lyrics:
Little drops of water, little grains of sand,
Make the mighty ocean, and the pleasant land.
So the little minutes, humble though they be,
Make the mighty ages of eternity.
image_prompt: cartoon gentle raindrops falling into a sparkling ocean, dreamy storybook style

title: Little Star Reprise
lyrics:
Up above the world so high,
Like a diamond in the sky,
Twinkle, twinkle, all night long,
Singing out a gentle song.
image_prompt: cartoon dreamy night sky filled with twinkling stars, calm storybook style

title: The Little Turtle
lyrics:
There was a little turtle,
He lived in a box.
He swam in a puddle,
He climbed on the rocks.
image_prompt: cartoon cheerful little turtle near a puddle and rocks, sunny garden storybook style

title: Five Little Speckled Frogs
lyrics:
Five little speckled frogs, sat on a speckled log,
Eating some most delicious bugs, yum yum!
One jumped into the pool, where it was nice and cool,
Now there are four speckled frogs, glub glub.
image_prompt: cartoon speckled frogs sitting on a log by a pond, cheerful storybook style

title: One Two Three Four Five
lyrics:
One, two, three, four, five,
Once I caught a fish alive.
Six, seven, eight, nine, ten,
Then I let it go again.
image_prompt: cartoon child fishing happily at a sunny pond, colorful storybook style

title: The Bee and the Flower
lyrics:
A little bee went buzzing round,
From flower to flower without a sound.
He gathered honey sweet and gold,
A busy little bee so bold.
image_prompt: cartoon cute bee flying among colorful flowers in a garden, cheerful storybook style

title: Little White Duck
lyrics:
There's a little white duck sitting in the water,
A little white duck doing what he oughter.
He took a bite of a lily pad,
Flapped his wings and he felt glad.
image_prompt: cartoon little white duck swimming among lily pads on a pond, storybook style
